title: Remote Desktop and Screen-Sharing Setup
text:
Q: How do I set up remote desktop and screen-sharing on my computer?
A: Windows: Step 1: Open the Start menu and type 'Remote Desktop Connection' to find the application. Step 2: Enter the name or IP address of the computer you want to connect to and click 'Connect.' Step 3: If prompted, enter your credentials (username and password) to access the remote machine. Step 4: To enable remote access on the target computer, right-click 'This PC,' select 'Properties,' then 'Remote settings,' and check 'Allow remote connections to this computer.' macOS: Step 1: Open 'System Preferences' and select 'Sharing.' Step 2: Check the box next to 'Screen Sharing' to enable it. Step 3: Click 'Computer Settings' to set a password if desired. Step 4: To connect to another Mac, open 'Finder,' select 'Go' from the menu, then 'Connect to Server,' and enter the VNC address (vnc://[IP address]). Step 5: Enter your credentials when prompted to access the shared screen.
